title: polycarpon peploides var. rotundifolium
intro: Polycarpon peploides var. rotundifolium, also known as Round-leaved Alsine, is a perennial plant species found in Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which aid in wound healing and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Polycarpon peploides var. rotundifolium include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
